title: guevaria micranthera
intro: Guevaria micranthera, also known as the 'Palo Santo', is a plant species native to South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its essential oil rich in beta-caryophyllene. The health benefits of Guevaria micranthera include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and improve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including essential oils, tinctures, and incense sticks, which can be used for medicinal, aromatherapeutic, and spiritual purposes.
